name: sap-ordenes-produccion
description: Backend TypeScript: órdenes de producción SAP (Sybase ASE) → SQL Server, API Express y sync programable.

scripts.prisma:sql:apply: prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260408140000_init_sap_ordenes_tables/migration.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma && prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260408160000_rename_to_ordenes_produccion/migration.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma && prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260415120000_add_kpi_prod_logistica/migration.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma && prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260415124500_add_kpi_prod_logistica_descriptions/migration.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma && prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260415132000_kpi_a_tiempo_nullable/migration.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma && prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260415142000_add_kpi_prod_eficiencia/migration.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma && prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260415150000_add_kpi_prod_costos/migration.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma && prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260415170000_add_fact_produccion_fact_consumos_dim_ordenes/migration.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma
